sections.description: AI-powered CSS/JS asset scanner for WordPress.
sections.changelog: Version 1.7.62b (beta): Fixes carried-over rescan URLs being erased when typing in the Include URLs box — after 'Rescan ET Candidates' or 'Rescan 0-Results URLs' pre-fills Step 1, manually adding more URLs now ADDS to the carried set instead of replacing it. Carries 1.7.61b (Rescan-ET button styling) and 1.7.60b (results-table polish).
